sections.sectionTitle: Zion a Hoihna leh a Muan'huaina

verses.text: Topa lian a, i Pasian' khuapi sungah nakpi takin phat ding ahi hi
Kumpi lianpa' khuapi, leilu lama a om ama mual siangtho hoihin a sang mahmah Zion mual pen leitung khempeuh' lungdamna ahi hi
A muan'huai tua mualah amah a hu taktakpa ahihna Pasian in a lakkhin hi
Ahi zongin, kumpite kikaikhawmin, a sim dingin hong kuankhawm uh hi
Amaute in Zion a muh phetun lamdangsa mahmah uh a, dipkua vatin tai uh hi
Numei nausuak na a sa bangin amaute linggawp uh hi
Nisuahna huihpi tawh Tarshish kici teembaw liante nang na susia hi
Ka zaksa bangun Vanglian Topa' khuapi, i Pasian' khuapi, Pasian in a phuhkip ngitngetna ka mu khin uh hi
Pasian aw, na biakinn sungah nangma itna kip ka ngaihsun uh hi
Pasian aw, na min in leimong dong a zelh bangin, nangmah hong kiphatna in zong a zel hi. Na taklam khut gualzawhna tawh a kidim hi
Zion Mual lungdamsak in. Na thukhenna hangin Judah mite lungdamsak in

Hih pen eima Pasian hi a, a tawntungin eima Pasian hi, ci-in khangkikte tungah na gen theihna dingun Zion kiimvelin pai-in, a tausang phazah sim un la, a kulh phungmai a hoih mahmahte ngaihsunin, a phualpi muan'huaite va nawk kim un. Amah pen a tawntungin lam hong lak dingpa ahi hi.
